onboarding.title: Welcome to Content Strategy
onboarding.subtitle: Plan content, track performance, and optimize with data-driven cycles
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've set up 5 articles, 3 keywords, 4 content hubs, 1 GSC cycle, 2 actions, and 2 competitors as examples.

steps.title: Plan your content
steps.description: Organize articles into hubs (pillar/cluster), track through a pipeline from idea to published, and set priorities.

steps.title: Track & optimize
steps.description: Import GSC data to measure keyword performance, identify quick wins, and create optimization actions.

steps.title: Use your AI agent
steps.description: Ask your agent to plan articles, import GSC data, analyze performance, or suggest next actions.

reference.overview: A comprehensive content planning and SEO optimization tool. Manage your content pipeline, import Google Search Console data, classify keywords by quadrant, and track optimization actions with measurable outcomes.

concepts.name: Articles
concepts.description: Content pieces tracked through a pipeline: idea → planned → drafting → review → published → optimizing. Organized into hubs.

concepts.name: Keywords
concepts.description: Search terms with GSC metrics (impressions, clicks, CTR, position). Auto-classified into quadrants: star, quick-win, CTR opportunity, or long-term target.

concepts.name: Hubs
concepts.description: Content clusters with a pillar article and supporting cluster articles. Think topic authority architecture.

concepts.name: Cycles
concepts.description: Periodic GSC data snapshots with sitewide metrics, daily trends, and cannibalization warnings.

concepts.name: Actions
concepts.description: Optimization tasks (meta rewrites, content expansion, internal linking) with expected vs. actual outcomes.

prompts: Create a new pillar article plan for 'remote work productivity'
Show me all quick-win keywords with position between 5-15
What actions are in progress and when were they started?
List all articles in the planning hub that need to move to drafting
tips: Articles belong to hubs — set the hubId field to organize content into pillar/cluster architecture
Keywords are auto-classified into quadrants based on position, impressions, and CTR thresholds
Cycles capture point-in-time GSC snapshots — create a new cycle each time you import fresh data
Actions track before/after metrics so you can measure the impact of your optimizations
Multi-domain support: use domains.json and domainId fields to track content across multiple sites

articles.title: No articles yet
articles.description: Start planning your content strategy. Add articles and organize them into topic hubs.
articles.suggestedPrompt: Plan 3 articles for a hub about 'remote work': a pillar guide and 2 cluster articles
